# @json-express/adapter-json — AI Context

File-persisted database adapter: collections live in `data/<collection>.json` and every mutation is written back atomically (debounced, tmp-file + rename).

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/adapter-json
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import, instantiate, or register this package in code.** Activate among multiple adapters with `jex.adapter=@json-express/adapter-json`.

## Configuration (.env)
No package-specific keys. Data location is fixed: `./data/*.json`.

## What it unlocks
- Everything adapter-memory does (CRUD, `?_expand=` relations, unique constraints), PLUS persistence across restarts.
- New collections created at runtime get their own `data/<name>.json`.
- The zero-infrastructure choice for demos and mock servers (see `@json-express/preset-mock-server`).
